pr.title: Record: 11L + XSA4 + EMA + Late QAT + GPTQ-lite (1.1325 BPB)

output.summary: Combines XSA4 parameter reuse with 11-layer GPT, EMA, late QAT, and GPTQ-lite quantization under fullgraph compilation for the 10m/16MB run.
techniques: Cross-layer Shared Attention frees params so 11-layer GPT fits the budget
Full-training EMA plus late-stage QAT before int6 GPTQ-lite clipping
fullgraph=True compilation to squeeze extra steps in 10-minute budget
